nasb.text: He came to a certain place and spent the night there, because the sun had set; and he took one of the stones of the place and put it under his head, and lay down in that place.

esv.text: And he came to a certain place and stayed there that night, because the sun had set. Taking one of the stones of the place, he put it under his head and lay down in that place to sleep.

cnv.text: 來到一個地方，就在那裡過夜，因為太陽已經落了。他拾起那地方的一塊石頭，把它放在頭底下作枕頭，就在那裡躺下睡了。

ccb.text: 到了一个地方，太阳已经下山，他便在那里过夜。他枕着一块石头睡觉，

csbs.text: 他到了一个地方，因为太阳西沉，就在那里过夜。他就地拿了一块石头，放在自己头底下，就在那地方躺下睡了。
